footerFunded.en: The DigiPal Project was funded by the European Union Seventh Framework Programme (FP7) under grant agreement n° 263751. This site is now maintained by a team at AOROC at the École Pratique des Hautes Études – Université PSL (Paris, France), hosted on infrastructure provided by HumaNum in the context of Biblissima+ Cluster 4.
